title: psychotria aurantiaca var. subplumbea
intro: Psychotria aurantiaca var. subplumbea is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, also known as the coffee or madder family, and is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Psychotria aurantiaca var. subplumbea include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
